calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar May-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Giles Logging, LLC. as follows:
Principal $164,466.83
Prejudgment Interest $7,164.54
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $400.00, for a total of $174,531.37
Judgment signed in open court.
